query: SELECT a.id, a.pdiId, p.colaboradorId FROM actions a JOIN pdis p ON a.pdiId = p.id WHERE p.colaboradorId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'usuarioteste4@ckmtalents.net');
